+{"id":"bd-hhv3","title":"Test and document molecular chemistry commands","description":"## Context

Implemented the molecular chemistry UX commands per the design docs:
- gastown/mayor/rig/docs/molecular-chemistry.md
- gastown/mayor/rig/docs/chemistry-design-changes.md

Commit: cadf798b

## New Commands to Test

| Command | Purpose |
|---------|---------|
| `bd pour <proto>` | Instantiate proto as persistent mol |
| `bd wisp create <proto>` | Instantiate proto as ephemeral wisp |
| `bd hook [--agent]` | Inspect what's on an agent's hook |

## Enhanced Commands to Test

| Command | Changes |
|---------|---------|
| `bd mol spawn --pour` | New flag, `--persistent` deprecated |
| `bd mol bond --pour` | Force liquid phase on wisp target |
| `bd pin --for <agent> --start` | Chemistry workflow support |

## Test Scenarios

1. **bd pour**: Create persistent mol from a proto
   - Verify creates in .beads/ (not .beads-wisp/)
   - Verify variable substitution works
   - Verify --dry-run works

2. **bd wisp create**: Create ephemeral wisp from proto
   - Verify creates in .beads-wisp/
   - Verify bd wisp list shows it
   - Verify bd mol squash works
   - Verify bd mol burn works

3. **bd hook**: Inspect pinned work
   - Pin something, verify bd hook shows it
   - Test --agent flag
   - Test --json output

4. **bd pin --for**: Assign work to agent
   - Verify sets pinned=true
   - Verify sets assignee
   - Verify --start sets status=in_progress

5. **bd mol bond --pour**: Force liquid on wisp target
   - Bond a proto to a wisp with --pour
   - Verify spawned issues are in .beads/

## Documentation

- Update CLAUDE.md with new commands
- Add examples to --help output (already done)
- Consider adding to docs/CLI_REFERENCE.md

## Code Review

- Check for edge cases
- Verify error messages are helpful
- Ensure --json output is consistent","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-22T02:22:10.906646-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-22T02:22:10.906646-08:00"}
 {"id":"bd-hkr6","title":"GH#518: Document bd setup command","description":"bd setup is undiscoverable. Add to README/docs. Currently only findable by grepping source. See GitHub issue #518.","status":"tombstone","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-16T01:03:54.664668-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-17T16:11:17.070763-08:00","deleted_at":"2025-12-17T16:11:17.070763-08:00","deleted_by":"batch delete","delete_reason":"batch delete","original_type":"task"}
 {"id":"bd-hlsw","title":"Add sync resilience guardrails for forced pushes and prefix mismatches","description":"Beads can get into unrecoverable sync states when remote forces pushes occur (e.g., rebases) combined with prefix mismatches from multi-worker scenarios. Add detection, prevention, and auto-recovery features to handle this gracefully.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2025-12-14T10:40:14.872875259-07:00","updated_at":"2025-12-14T10:40:14.872875259-07:00"}
 {"id":"bd-hlsw.3","title":"Auto-recovery mode (bd sync --auto-recover)","description":"Add bd sync --auto-recover flag that: detects problematic sync state, backs up .beads/issues.db with timestamp, rebuilds DB from JSONL atomically, verifies consistency, reports what was fixed. Provides safety valve when sync integrity fails.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-14T10:40:20.599836875-07:00","updated_at":"2025-12-14T10:40:20.599836875-07:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-hlsw.3","depends_on_id":"bd-hlsw","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-14T10:40:20.600435888-07:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"}]}
